manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
Provide one single-word clue that relates to some of your team's words from the list below. You can choose to how many and to which words your clue relates to.
The goal is to have your partner guess all of your team's words based on the clues you give them, before the other team has uncovered all of theirs. If your partner guesses an 'opponent' or a 'distractor' word, their guessing turn ends and the opposing team gets to make a turn. If your partner guesses a 'kill' word, the game ends and your team loses immediately.
The more words your clue relates to, the quicker you can win the game, but the harder the associations may be to guess for your partner, so choose your clue word wisely. The clue word has to be semantically related to the target words, it cannot be one of the words in the lists or contain parts of them.

Always give your single-word clue and your comma-separated list of related target words in the following format and make your answers as short as possible, never include any other text than is required in this form:

CLUE: <WORD>
TARGETS: <TARGETS>

Your team words are: superhero, air, chick, pitch, draft, dinosaur, bat, smuggler, arm.
Your opponent's team words are: table, pit, march, engine, tokyo, cricket, lion, mexico.
Distractor words are: hood, nut, key, tablet, mug, life, change.
The kill words are: circle.

message.content:
.CLUE: Baseball
TARGETS: pitch, bat, arm, draft
message.reasoning:
We need to give a one-word clue related to some of our team's words: superhero, air, chick, pitch, draft, dinosaur? Wait list: superhero, air, chick, pitch, draft, dinosaur, bat, smuggler, arm.

We must avoid giving clue that is any of the words or parts of them. Must be single word clue.

We should choose clue that connects multiple of our words but not opponent, distractor, kill.

Potential connections: "baseball" relates to pitch, bat, arm (throwing). Also "draft" could be sports draft, but baseball also has draft. "Superhero" maybe not. "Air" relates to baseball (air ball). "Chick" no. "Dinosaur" no.

Another: "flight" relates to air, bat (flying mammal), superhero (fly), dinosaur (some could fly? Pterodactyl not dinosaur), smuggler? maybe not. "Arm" not.

"Pirate" relates to smuggler, arm (pirate arm?), air? Not.

"Jurassic" relates dinosaur, maybe smuggler? no.

"Comic" relates superhero, maybe chick? no.

"Pitch" also means tar, or "music". Could clue "song"? relates pitch (musical note), also hummingbird (chick?), but not.

Maybe clue "sports". That could include draft (sports draft), bat, arm (throwing arm), pitch (baseball pitch). Also superhero? sports heroes? Could be okay. No opponent words: table, pit, march, engine, tokyo, cricket, lion, mexico. "Sports" not one of those. Distractors: hood, nut, key, tablet, mug, life, change - none.

But does "sports" relate to "air"? Maybe not strongly. Could just target draft, bat, arm, pitch. That's four words.

Clue "Baseball" might also be a word separate from list. Does it contain part of opponent? No. "Baseball" is not prohibited. However "Baseball" contains "ball" which is not a word in lists. It's okay. Could clue "Baseball". That directly ties to pitch, bat, arm (throwing), maybe "draft" (MLB draft). Also "air" (air ball). That's many.

But ensure clue is a single word; "Baseball" is one. Works.

Provide list of target words: pitch, bat, arm, draft, air maybe? Up to you. The clue must not be ambiguous causing opponent words. "Baseball" may inadvertently hint at "cricket" (opponent word). Cricket is also a sport. That's a risk: opponent has "cricket". Giving clue "Baseball" might lead partner to guess cricket as it's also a sport, but could be ambiguous. The rule: if partner guesses opponent word, turn ends and opposing team gets to make a turn. So it's risky.

Maybe "Pitcher" ties to pitch and arm, but also baseball. "Pitcher" also a container (distractor key? no). Might hint at "dinosaur"? no. But "Pitcher" could also be a plant (pitcher plant). Not relevant.

Better clue: "Throw". Relates to arm, bat (throw bat? maybe), pitch (throw pitch), draft (throw? no). Not great.

Maybe clue "Draft" as clue? can't because it's a team word. Can't.

Maybe clue "Airline". Relates to air, smuggler (air smuggling?), dinosaur? no.

Maybe clue "Smuggler" is a team word itself, can't use.

Perhaps clue "Superhero" is team word can't.

Maybe clue "Mammal". Relates to bat (mammal), dinosaur (some are reptiles), chick (bird), superhero? no.

But need multiple.

Maybe clue "Flying". Relates air, bat (flying mammal), superhero (fly), dinosaur (pterosaurs not dinosaurs), smuggler? maybe "air smuggler". Could be 4 words.

But we must avoid opponent "cricket" (insect that flies). Could cause confusion. Might be okay.

Better stick with "Baseball" and target pitch, bat, arm, draft. Accept risk.

Probably okay.

We need format:

CLUE: Baseball
TARGETS: pitch, bat, arm, draft

Make sure no extra text
